imageHints.suggestedAspect: square or landscape (object-fit: contain to show full product)
imageHints.suggestedSubject: single product on neutral or transparent background
imageHints.treatment: product displayed with object-fit: contain so full product is visible

useCases: Menu item or product spotlight posts with pricing
Product launch announcement with hero photography
New inventory arrival or restock announcements
avoidCases: When the product image has a complex background (use a clean packshot)
When multiple products need to be shown (use product-feature-grid)
When no price or CTA is relevant to the post
